title: Ukuxhathisa Ngokungenabundlobongela, ngeminyaka yee-1970 kunye nee-1980: Ukusuka kwi-Black Consciousness Ukuya kwi-UDF
subject: History

sources.title: Congress of South African Trade Unions (COSATU)

slides.title: Ukuxhathisa Ngokungenabundlobongela, ngeminyaka yee-1970 kunye nee-1980
slides.lead: Indlela ukuxhathisa kwangaphakathi okwabuyisela ngayo umdla wabachasi bocalucalulo - ukusuka kwi-Black Consciousness naseSoweto ukuya kwi-UDF nakwiimeko zongxamiseko.

media.alt: Inqindi eloyisiweyo ephakanyisiweyo enyuka ngaphezu komgca othe tyaba oqinileyo, ofuzisela ukuxhathisa kwabantu abaninzi kucalucalulo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='150' y='60' width='20' height='72' rx='5' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='140' y='44' width='40' height='26' rx='8' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='138' y='40' width='9' height='20' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='150' y='36' width='9' height='24' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='162' y='38' width='9' height='22' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='40' y='150' width='240' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='262' cy='46' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yakha isakhelo seyunithi. Ngeminyaka yee-1960 ukuvalwa kwe-ANC ne-PAC, iTyala laseRivonia kunye nezigwebo zentolongo ezinde kwashiya ukuxhathisa kwangaphakathi kubuthathaka. Esi sifundo silandelela indlela, ukusuka ngasekupheleni kweminyaka yee-1960, iliza elitsha lokuxhathisa elakhelwa kwakhona ngaphakathi elizweni: kuqala iimbono (i-Black Consciousness), emva koko uvukelo lolutsha (1976), abasebenzi abaququzelelweyo (iimanyano), ekugqibeleni umanyano lwabantu abaninzi (i-UDF) urhulumente owazama ukuluqoba ngolawulo longxamiseko. Cela abafundi baqhubeke bebuza: ngubani oxhathisayo, njani, kwaye urhulumente uphendula njani?

slides.title: 'Ishumi leminyaka elithuleyo' nesiphelo salo
slides.lead: Ngasekupheleni kweminyaka yee-1960 ucalucalulo lwalubonakala luqinile - kodwa ukuxhathisa kwakubuyela kwakhona ngokuthuleyo.

blocks.text: Emva kweSharpeville (1960) urhulumente wayivimba i-**ANC** ne-**PAC**, wavalela abakhokeli abanjenge-Nelson Mandela entolongo, waza waqhubela imibutho yenkululeko ekubhacweni nasemazantsi. Umbhikisho ovulelekileyo wabantu abaninzi ngaphakathi elizweni watyunyuzwa, kwaye iminyaka yee-1960 ngamanye amaxesha ibizwa ngokuba 'lishumi leminyaka elithuleyo'.

items: Imithetho ecinezelayo yayivumela ukubanjwa ngaphandle kokuxoxwa kwetyala nokuvinjwa kwamatshantliziyo.
Uqoqosho lwakhula, kodwa abantu abantsundu bahlala bengabandakanywanga kumandla ezopolitiko.
Ukuxhathisa okutsha kwakuya kukhula kwabafundi, abasebenzi noluntu kunemibutho eyayivinjiwe.

slides.notes: Miselisela ukuqhubeka notshintsho. Abafundi sele bedibene neSharpeville kunye notshintsho lwaya kwidabi elixhobileyo kwiyunithi yangaphambili. Gxininisa ukuba uvuselelo lweminyaka yee-1970 lwalusesona sibalo sokuthethwa ngemibutho emitsha eyayisebenza ngokusemthethweni okanye ngokungathi sina ngaphakathi eMzantsi Afrika, kuba imibutho emiselweyo yayivinjiwe. Oku kubeka isizathu sokuba kutheni i-Black Consciousness kunye neemanyano ezizimeleyo zazibaluleke kangaka.

slides.title: I-Black Consciousness kunye no-Steve Biko
slides.lead: 'Esona sixhobo sinamandla ezandleni zomcinezeli yingqondo yocinezelweyo.'

blocks.text: Bekhathazekile ngezopolitiko zabafundi ezikhokelwa ngabamhlophe, abafundi abantsundu bahlukana baza basungula i-**South African Students' Organisation (SASO)** ngo-1969, no-**Steve Biko** njengomongameli wayo wokuqala. Intanda-bulumko yabo, i-**Black Consciousness (BC)**, yayikhuthaza abantu abantsundu baseMzantsi Afrika ukuba bawukhabe umkhwa wokuzibona bephantsi, bazingce ngesazisi sabo, baze bazikhulule ngokwasengqondweni ngaphambi kokuba bazikhulule ngokwezopolitiko.

items: 'Omnyama' wachazwa ngokwezopolitiko ukuquka abantu abantsundu, abeBala nabaseIndiya abacinezelwe ngucalucalulo.
I-Black People's Convention (1972) yasasaza iimbono ze-BC eluntwini ngeeprojekthi zokuzinceda.
I-BC yanika isizukulwana esitsha ukuzithemba kunye nolwimi lokuxhathisa.

media.alt: Intloko eyenziwe ngomfanekiso ebonisa icala inelanga elinyukayo ngaphakathi, elifuzisela inkululeko yengqondo kunye nokuzingca.

slides.notes: I-SASO yasekwa ngo-1968 yaza yasungulwa ngokusesikweni ngo-1969 eTurfloop; gcina ugxininiso ku-1969 njengonyaka wokusungulwa. Chaza i-BC njengenkululeko yengqondo: ukuzingca, ukuzithemba nobumbano phakathi kwabacinezelweyo. Qaphela utshintsho lwentsingiselo yezopolitiko yegama elithi 'omnyama' ukwakha isazisi esibanzi. Zoba umahluko kwiimbutho zangaphambili: i-BC yayisebenza ngokuvulelekileyo nangokusemthethweni ekuqaleni, nto leyo eyenza yasasazeka ngokukhawuleza kwiikhampasi nakwiikliniki nakwiinkqubo zoluntu.

slides.title: Uvukelo lwaseSoweto
slides.lead: Umbhikisho wabafundi wokuchasa isiBhulu ezikolweni waba luvukelo lukazwelonke.

blocks.text: Ngo-1974 urhulumente wayalela ukuba i-**siBhulu** sisetyenziswe ngokulinganayo nesiNgesi njengolwimi lokufundisa ezikolweni zabantu abantsundu. Abafundi, abaninzi ababenefuthe le-Black Consciousness, bakubona oku 'njengolwimi lomcinezeli'. Ngo-**16 Juni 1976** amawaka abafundi baseSoweto batyhutyha ngoxolo; amapolisa avula umlilo, waza umbhikisho wagqabhuka waba luvukelo olwasasazeka kulo lonke ilizwe.

items: Amanani asemthethweni abeka abafileyo kwi-23 ngosuku lokuqala; uqikelelo lwakamva lunyuka ngokugqithisileyo.
Umfanekiso ka-Hector Pieterson osweleka waba ziindaba eziphambili kwihlabathi liphela.
Amawaka olutsha abhacela emazweni angaphandle aza azibandakanya nemibutho yenkululeko.

media.alt: Umgca wabafundi abatyhutyhayo abaphethe iplakhadi ephakanyisiweyo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='24' width='54' height='30' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='176' y='54' width='4' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='40' cy='58' r='12'/><rect x='33' y='72' width='14' height='42'/><circle cx='84' cy='54' r='12'/><rect x='77' y='68' width='14' height='46'/><circle cx='128' cy='58' r='12'/><rect x='121' y='72' width='14' height='42'/></g><rect x='24' y='126' width='196' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha ubundlobongela ngobunono: gxila kwinjongo yoxolo yabafundi kunye nokusetyenziswa kwamandla angeyomfanelo. Inani labafileyo liyaphikiswa - caphula i-23 esemthethweni ngosuku lokuqala ngelixa uqaphela uqikelelo oluphezulu lwababhali-mbali, uze uphephe inani elinye 'lokugqibela'. Gxininisa iziphumo: ukugxekwa kwehlabathi, ukwanda kwabo bazibandakanya ne-ANC ne-PAC ekubhacweni, kunye nokufika kolutsha njengamandla aphambili emzabalazweni. Nxulumanisa nase-Bantu Education kwiyunithi yeBanga 9.

slides.title: Ukusweleka kuka-Biko nokuvinjwa kuka-1977
slides.lead: Urhulumente wazama ukubulala imbono ngokuthulisa imibutho yayo.

blocks.text: U-**Steve Biko** wabanjwa waza wasweleka esiseluqoqoshweni lwamapolisa nge-**12 Septemba 1977** ngenxa yokwenzakala awakufumana ngexesha lophando. Ukusweleka kwakhe kwabangela isikhalo sehlabathi. Nge-**19 Okthoba 1977** urhulumente wavimba malunga **nemibutho eli-18 yeBlack Consciousness nenxulumeneyo**, kuquka i-SASO ne-Black People's Convention, waza wavala amaphephandaba ayebhale ngalo mbutho.

items: U-Biko waba luphawu lwehlabathi lokuxhathisa nolwenkohlakalo yocalucalulo.
Ukuvinjwa kwemibutho akuzange kuyitshabalalise imibono eyayiyisasazile.
Uninzi lwamatshantliziyo lwahlanganisana kwakhona ngeemanyano, iicawa nemibutho yoluntu.

media.alt: Ikhandlela elivutha ngokuzinzileyo ecaleni kweqhina lekhonkco elophukileyo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='72' y='70' width='20' height='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M82 46 q10 12 0 22 q-10 -10 0 -22 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 74 a14 14 0 1 1 0 28 a14 14 0 0 1 0 -28 Z' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M138 88 a14 14 0 1 0 12 0' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Uphando ngokusweleka kuka-Biko alufumananga mntu unetyala, nto leyo eyaba bubungqina bengalungelelaniso yocalucalulo; ungayikhankanya oku ngelixa ugcina iinkcukacha zilungele ubudala. Ingongoma ephambili yohlalutyo: ingcinezelo yayinokuvimba imibutho ize ibulale abakhokeli, kodwa i-Black Consciousness yayisele iyitshintshile indlela isizukulwana esasicinga ngayo, kwaye abo bantu bawuqhubela phambili umzabalazo kwiziseko ezitsha. Oku kudibanisa ngokugqibeleleyo nokunyuka kweemanyano zabasebenzi.

slides.title: Amandla abasebenzi abaququzelelweyo
slides.lead: Ugwayimbo neemanyano zaguqula amandla oqoqosho abangoxinzelelo lwezopolitiko.

blocks.text: U-**gwayimbo lwaseThekwini lwango-1973** - amashumi amawaka abasebenzi beyeka umsebenzi - wabonisa amandla entshukumo yabantu abaninzi waza wavuselela iliza elitsha leemanyano zabasebenzi abantsundu ezizimeleyo. Ezi zakhula ngalo lonke ixesha leshumi leminyaka, zisungula i-**Federation of South African Trade Unions (FOSATU)** ngo-1979 kwaye, ngoDisemba 1985, kwasungulwa enkulu ngokugqithisileyo i-**Congress of South African Trade Unions (COSATU)**.

items: I-COSATU yasungulwa nge-1 Disemba 1985 no-Elijah Barayi njengomongameli no-Jay Naidoo njengonobhala-jikelele.
Iimanyano zadibanisa izikhalazo zemivuzo nomzabalazo obanzi wokuchasa ucalucalulo.
Ugwayimbo nokungayi emsebenzini kwaba zizixhobo ezinamandla ngeminyaka yee-1980.

media.alt: Isakhiwo sefektri neqela labasebenzi bemi kunye phambi kwaso.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='50' width='74' height='70' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='166' y='30' width='14' height='24' fill='#5c6b40'/><rect x='160' y='66' width='16' height='16' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='186' y='66' width='16' height='16' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='33' y='84' width='14' height='36'/><circle cx='72' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='65' y='84' width='14' height='36'/><circle cx='104' cy='70' r='12'/><rect x='97' y='84' width='14' height='36'/></g><rect x='20' y='120' width='204' height='8' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza isizathu sokuba iimanyano zazibalulekile: ucalucalulo lwaluxhomekeke kubasebenzi abantsundu, ngoko abasebenzi abaququzelelweyo babenokuwonakalisa uqoqosho baze banyanzelise iingxoxo. I-FOSATU (1979) yakha isithethe esingacalulwanga, sasefloreni; i-COSATU (1985) yamanyanisa amalungu amaninzi kakhulu yaza yazibandakanya ngokuvulelekileyo nomzabalazo obanzi wenkululeko. Nxulumanisa nexesha le-UDF: iimanyano nemibutho yoluntu yaqala ukusebenza kunye kwiintshukumo zokungayi emsebenzini nakwii-boycott.

slides.title: IPalamente yamaGumbi amaThathu
slides.lead: 'Uhlaziyo' olwanika abanye ilungelo lokuvota lugxotha uninzi.

blocks.text: Ngo-1983 urhulumente wazisa umgaqo-siseko omtsha owadala i-**Tricameral Parliament** enamagumbi amathathu ohlukeneyo: elinye labamhlophe, elinye labeBala kunye nelinye labaseIndiya - kodwa **kungabikho kumelwa nakancinci koninzi lwabantu abantsundu**. Yayiyilelwe ukwahlula abacinezelweyo nokunika ucalucalulo ubuso obamkelekayo ngakumbi.

items: Amandla okwenene ahlala ezandleni zabamhlophe ngenkqubo eyayithe chatha ngakubo.
Abantu abantsundu babemele basebenzise 'amalungelo' kwiiBantustan kuphela.
Endaweni yokwahlula abachasi, yabamanyanisa kumbhikisho.

media.alt: Iibhokisi zamagumbi ezintathu ezahlukeneyo, ezimbini zincinci enye inkulu kwaye ilawula, uninzi lushiywe ngaphandle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='20' y='40' width='56' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='86' y='55' width='46' height='45' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='142' y='55' width='46' height='45' fill='#a8bcae'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='206' cy='84' r='9'/><circle cx='222' cy='96' r='9'/><circle cx='210' cy='104' r='9'/></g><rect x='198' y='116' width='40' height='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='16' y='108' width='176' height='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Esi sesinye sezizathu eziphambili zokusekwa kwe-UDF. Yenza ingongoma yohlalutyo icace: inkqubo yeTricameral yayilisu lokuthenga nokwahlula - thenga ezona nkokeli ziphambili zabeBala nabaseIndiya, wahlule abantu abantsundu kwiiBantustan. Buza abafundi ukuba kutheni ukugxotha uninzi kwenza 'uhlaziyo' lube yimpazamo yezopolitiko. Kwanika ukuxhathisa isikhalazo esinye esimanyanisayo.

slides.title: I-United Democratic Front

blocks.text: Nge-**20 Agasti 1983** malunga nabantu abangama-10,000 bahlanganisana e-**Mitchells Plain**, eKapa, ukusungula i-**United Democratic Front (UDF)**. Bephendula ubizo luka-Mfundisi u-**Allan Boesak** lokuchasa umgaqo-siseko weTricameral, abathunywa abavela kwiimibutho emalunga nama-**565 eyayimanyene** - imibutho yoluntu, iimanyano, iicawa, imibutho yabafundi neyabesifazane - bazibandakanya kumanyano olunye olubanzi.

items: I-UDF yazichaza ngokuvulelekileyo neminqweno yeFreedom Charter ne-ANC eyayisekubhacweni.
Iinkokeli zaziquka u-Albertina Sisulu, u-Archie Gumede kunye no-Popo Molefe.
Yaququzelela ii-boycott, ukungayi emsebenzini kunye namaphulo abantu abaninzi kulo lonke ilizwe.

media.alt: Abantu abaninzi abancinci abahlanganene ngaphantsi kwebhanela enye, befuzisela umanyano.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='70' y='22' width='100' height='30' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='118' y='52' width='4' height='30' fill='#5c1414'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><circle cx='40' cy='96' r='9'/><circle cx='66' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='92' cy='98' r='9'/><circle cx='120' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='148' cy='98' r='9'/><circle cx='174' cy='90' r='9'/><circle cx='200' cy='96' r='9'/></g><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='53' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='79' cy='118' r='9'/><circle cx='107' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='135' cy='118' r='9'/><circle cx='163' cy='114' r='9'/><circle cx='189' cy='118' r='9'/></g><rect x='24' y='132' width='196' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: I-UDF sisiseko sokuxhathisa kwangaphakathi kweminyaka yee-1980. Gxininisa ubume bayo - umanyano lwamakhulu eemibutho ezizimeleyo endaweni yeqela elinye - nto leyo eyayenza kube nzima kurhulumente ukuluvimba. Yayingacalulwanga kwaye yayisebenzisa iFreedom Charter, isebenza njengomhlobo wangaphakathi we-ANC eyayisekubhacweni. Qaphela amagama eenkokeli ukwandisa umfanekiso ngaphaya kwabantu abanye okanye ababini, kuquka iinkokeli zabesifazane ezinjenge-Albertina Sisulu.

slides.title: Ukuxhathisa ngokungenabundlobongela, 1969-1986

events.label: U-Biko usweleka esiseluqoqoshweni; imibutho ye-BC iyavinjwa

slides.notes: Sebenzisa oku ukudibanisa ngaphambi kweeslayidi zokugqibela zohlalutyo. Cela abafundi balandele iphethini: iimbono (1969), abasebenzi (1973), ulutsha (1976), ingcinezelo (1977), umanyano lwabantu abaninzi (1983), ungqubuzwano nolawulo longxamiseko (1985-86). Bonisa ukuba isigaba ngasinye sakhelwe kwesangaphambili - umbutho wakhula wabanzi kwaye waququzelelwa ngcono nangaphantsi kwengcinezelo enkulu.

slides.title: Iimeko zongxamiseko, 1985-1986
slides.lead: Njengoko iilokishi zivukela, urhulumente walawula ngommiselo wongxamiseko.

blocks.text: NgoJanuwari 1985 i-ANC eyayisekubhacweni yabiza abantu ukuba benze ucalucalulo **'lungalawuleki'**. Iilokishi zaqhambuka nge-boycott zerenti nezabathengi, ii-boycott zesikolo, ukungayi emsebenzini kunye nokusekwa kweekomiti zezitalato. Urhulumente waphendula nge-**meko yongxamiseko engapheleleyo nge-21 Julayi 1985**, kunye **nemeko yongxamiseko kazwelonke nge-12 Juni 1986**.

items: Amawaka abanjwa ngaphandle kokuxoxwa kwetyala, kuquka amatshantliziyo amaninzi e-UDF.
Umkhosi wathabatha iilokishi kwaye abezindaba babandezelwa kakhulu.
Ingcinezelo yalucothisa uvukelo kodwa ayikwazanga ukubuyisela ubume bocalucalulo obusemthethweni.

media.alt: Isithunzi senqwelo yomkhosi ekhuselweyo phambi kwezindlu zaselokishini emva komgca ovimbayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><rect x='150' y='70' width='34' height='30'/><rect x='190' y='74' width='34' height='26'/></g><path d='M150 70 l17 -14 l17 14 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M190 74 l17 -12 l17 12 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M28 96 l14 -18 h60 l14 18 v22 h-88 Z' fill='#5c6b40'/><circle cx='48' cy='120' r='11' fill='#333'/><circle cx='96' cy='120' r='11' fill='#333'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='30' height='10' fill='#3f4a2c'/><rect x='20' y='130' width='204' height='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ubizo 'lokungalawuleki' lwavela kwintetho ka-Oliver Tambo yangoJanuwari 1985. Chaza amaqhinga ovukelo lwabantu abaninzi - ii-boycott, ukungayi emsebenzini, iziseko ezizezinye zaselokishini - njengeenzame zokwenza ulawulo localucalulo ludilike ukusuka phantsi. Emva koko chaza iimeko zongxamiseko njengeenzame zikarhulumente zokuzityumza ngokubamba, imikhosi kunye nokubandezela. Isifundo sohlalutyo: amandla ayenokuyicinezela imibhikisho okwexeshana kodwa ayenza yanzulu ingxaki yokungabikho semthethweni eyaqhubela urhulumente kwiingxoxo ngo-1990.

slides.title: Ii-boycott, ukungayi emsebenzini kunye noxinzelelo lwehlabathi
slides.lead: Ukuxhathisa kwadibanisa uxinzelelo lwangaphakathi nolwangaphandle kwelizwe.

blocks.heading: Ii-boycott zabathengi nezerenti
blocks.text: Uluntu lwala ukuthenga kwiivenkile zabamhlophe okanye ukuhlawula irenti, luchaphazela uqoqosho neziseko zocalucalulo zasekhaya.

blocks.heading: Ukungayi emsebenzini nee-boycott zesikolo
blocks.text: Abasebenzi nabafundi barhoxisa umsebenzi wabo nokuya kwabo, bebonisa ukukhatywa kocalucalulo ngabantu abaninzi.

blocks.heading: Uxinzelelo lwehlabathi
blocks.text: Izohlwayo, ukurhoxiswa kotyalo-mali kunye nee-boycott zezemidlalo nezenkcubeko zayahlula iMzantsi Afrika kumazwe angaphandle.

slides.notes: Bonisa indlela uxinzelelo lwangaphakathi nolwangaphandle olwaxhasana ngayo. Ii-boycott zabathengi nezerenti zaguqula ukukhetha koqoqosho lwemihla ngemihla zaba zizixhobo zezopolitiko kwaye zazinxulumene ngokusondeleyo ne-UDF neemanyano. Izohlwayo zehlabathi kunye ne-boycott yezemidlalo (umzekelo ukugxothwa kwiiOlimpiki nokwahlulwa kweqakamba nombhoxo) zanyusa iindleko zocalucalulo zaza zaphakamisa umoya ngaphakathi kwelizwe. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba balinganise ukuba ngamnye ubume wanegalelo elingakanani - impikiswano yohlalutyo yenene ye-FET.

slides.title: Imbono eyaphila ngaphaya kokuvinjwa
slides.lead: I-Black Consciousness yayithi inkululeko iqala engqondweni.

blocks.text: Esona sixhobo sinamandla ezandleni zomcinezeli yingqondo yocinezelweyo.

Ingqiqo ka-Biko ichaza isizathu sokuba ukuxhathisa kweminyaka yee-1970 nee-1980 kwakunamandla kangaka. Nje ukuba abantu bakhaba inkolelo yokuba ucalucalulo lwaluyinto yendalo okanye lusisigxina, akukho mmiselo wokuvimba onokuyibuyisela ngokupheleleyo loo nkolelo. Ukuzithemba okwakhiwa yi-Black Consciousness kwondla uvukelo lolutsha lwango-1976, iimanyano, kunye nokuququzelela abantu abaninzi kwe-UDF.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa isicatshulwa ukudibanisa imisonto kunye. Ingxoxo ephambili yeyunithi: ingcinezelo yayinokuvimba imibutho, ivalele ize ibulale iinkokeli, kodwa yayingenako ukuyibuyisela ingqiqo yezopolitiko yezigidi zabantu baseMzantsi Afrika. Cela abafundi banxulumanise isicatshulwa nezehlo ezibini ubuncinane ezigqunyiweyo kwisifundo (umzekelo iSoweto 1976 kunye ne-UDF). Oku kubonisa uhlobo lwesiqendu esisekelwe kubungqina esivuzwa yiCAPS.

slides.title: Esikufundileyo - nemibuzo emele iphendulwe
slides.lead: Ukuxhathisa kwangaphakathi kwakhelwa kwakhona ukusuka kwiimbono ukuya kwintshukumo yabantu abaninzi, kwaye ubume bocalucalulo obusemthethweni badilika nangona ingcinezelo yayikhula.

blocks.text: Phakathi kwasekupheleni kweminyaka yee-1960 nasembindini weminyaka yee-1980, ukuxhathisa kwasuka kwi-**Black Consciousness** ukuya k-**vukelo lwango-1976**, i-**nkuseko yeemanyano**, kunye **nokuququzelela abantu abaninzi kwe-UDF**. 'Uhlaziyo' lweTricameral lukarhulumente kunye neemeko zongxamiseko zayo azizange ziphumelele ukufumana ubume obusemthethweni, ziseka isiseko seengxoxo ekupheleni kweshumi leminyaka.

blocks.question: Chaza indlela i-Black Consciousness eyanegalelo ngayo ekuvuselelweni kokuxhathisa ngeminyaka yee-1970. Sebenzisa ubungqina ukuxhasa impendulo yakho.
Kutheni i-United Democratic Front yaba luhlobo olusebenzayo kangaka lokuxhathisa kwangaphakathi ngeminyaka yee-1980?
'Iimeko zongxamiseko zango-1985-1986 zaluqinisa ucalucalulo kunokulubuthisa.' Uyavuma? Xoxa.

slides.notes: Vala ngokunxulumanisa izigaba njengonobangela nesiphumo. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengemisebenzi esekelwe kwimithombo okanye eyokubhala okwandisiweyo; ukwabiwa kweemakisi kufuzisela iindlela zesiqendu neyesincoko zeCAPS. Umbuzo wokugqibela wohlobo lwesincoko wenzelwe ngabom ukuba uphikiseke - vuza umgca ocacileyo wengxoxo oxhaswe bubungqina obuvela kwisifundo. Bonisa iyunithi elandelayo: iingxoxo, ukususwa kokuvinjwa kwe-ANC ngo-1990, kunye nendlela eya ku-1994.
